Message: Hey which Pilot has good showers on I-65 near Nashville
Exit 74 Smyrna. Ask for stall B they got better pressure
Copy that. Thanks
Roll Tide while you're at it
The game Saturday was hard to watch
I was in Chicago didn't see it. How bad
35-14. Bottom of the 3rd quarter just fell apart
Ugh
You doing the Louisville run this week
Yeah leave Wednesday morning
Mike's got me on Atlanta again. Third time this month
Atlanta traffic is punishment
Noted
Saw your buddy Dalton at the Flying J Cookeville he said hey
Good man. Tell him buy me a coffee next time
Hah. I told him that exactly
Hey what's the scale situation on I-71 north of Cincinnati
Open when I came through yesterday. Should be fine
Good. Running legal anyway just like to know
Always
Mike just called me about a double haul next week. You get the same call
Not yet. What route
Nashville to Chicago then back to Birmingham same week. Long one
If the miles are right I'll take it. Need to see the number
I-65 northbound near Franklin backed up solid. Accident. Go around on 31 if you can
Already on 31. Thanks for the heads up
Copy
You catch the boxing match last night
No I was doing the Knoxville run. Who won
Doesn't matter. Bad fight. Save yourself the time
Happy Fourth. You running today
Yeah. Mike doesn't take holidays off. You
Same. Columbus. Supposed to be back by evening but I doubt it
Good luck. I-71 might be rough with holiday traffic
Recommend the catfish plate at that diner off exit 58 on I-65 near Cullman. Better than it looks
Noted. I usually skip Cullman but I'll stop next time
Hey you doing Christmas in Birmingham or going to Nashville
Maybe both. Janelle's in Nashville now. Probably go up for a day or two
Mike said there might be a rate bump per mile in January. You hear that
I heard something. Don't count on it till the paper says so
Fair enough. Roll Tide
Roll Tide
Merry Christmas Ray. You and Maria have a good one
You too brother. Tell Janelle and Mama Jean hello from me
Will do
